zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh De Hill於1300年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布利其諾斯時，他的父親Sir Knight Richard de Hill27歲，母親Lady Alice Giffard27歲。他於1325年與Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow在英國英格蘭史洛普爾考特 本 希爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年4月4日在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫享年58歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾廷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh De Hill于1300年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾布利其諾斯时，他的父亲Sir Knight Richard de Hill27岁，母亲Lady Alice Giffard27岁。他于1325年与Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow在英国英格兰史洛普爾考特 本 希爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年4月4日在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫享年58岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾廷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh De Hill was born in 1300, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knight Richard de Hill, was 27 and his mother, Lady Alice Giffard, was 27. He married Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow in 1325, in Court of Hill, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 4 April 1358, in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Whittington, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh De Hill est né en 1300, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Richard de Hill, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Giffard, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow en 1325, à Court of Hill, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 avril 1358, à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh De Hillが1300年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Richard de Hillは27歳，母Lady Alice Giffardは27歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアコウルト オフ ヒルでLady Eleanor de Wlonkeslowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年4月4日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで58歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Court of Hill, Nash, Parish of Burford,: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쿠르트 프 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh De Hill(이)가 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight Richard de Hill(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Giffard(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쿠르트 프 힐에서 Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 4월 4일 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh De Hill nasceu em 1300, em Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight Richard de Hill, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Giffard, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow em 1325, em Court of Hill, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de abril de 1358, em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh De Hill родился в 1300 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knight Richard de Hill было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Giffard, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow в 1325 г. в местности коурт оф хилл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 апреля 1358 г. в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow en 1325, en Court of Hill, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de abril de 1358, en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
